steps.t: Rosentyl has asked you to get the ingredients she needs to make cawl. The butcher, Cunedda Moltgig, should have some lamb for her. You should go into …
Clegur's butcher, Cunedda Moltgig, has indicated that you can take the meat reserved for Rosentyl from the table inside the butcher shop.
Rosentyl has asked you to get the ingredients she needs to make cawl. Gloron Magimrud, at the farm atop the hill in Clegur, should have some vegetable…
Gloron Magimrud has said you can take some of the potatoes and carrots from his harvest, beside him in Clegur's fields.
Rosentyl has asked you to get the ingredients she needs to make cawl. She said you can talk to the provisioner's assistant about getting some leeks. Y…
Bortho Bishel, the Provisioner's Assistant, has said that you can take some leeks from the crate on the waggon beside the Provisioner.
You have collected all of the ingredients Rosentyl Flutch needs to make cawl. You should bring them to her in front of her home in Clegur.
